case_title: ELLIOT HAYES VS. KIM WONG et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-02-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAYES, ELLIOT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, KIM $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S) ELLIOT HAYES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY HAR, BRIAN JAMES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES, ELLIOT SERVED APR-29-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KIM

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-23-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-31-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, KIM
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-07-2010, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR OCT-19-2009. SEP-23-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR DAN H. DUNCAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION OCT-19-2009 THROUGH JAN-17-2010.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES, ELLIOT AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KIM DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-31-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-26-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-16-2009
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, KIM
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES, ELLIOT JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ARBITRATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAYES, ELLIOT

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-07-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. MAR-02-2010 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
